CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that physical therapy was administered to the resident in co-reatment sessions in the last seven days. ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2013

527 O0400C4_PT_DAY_NUM O0400C4_PT_DAY_NUM O0400C4 Number of Days Physical Therapy Administered CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that physical therapy was administered for at least 15 minutes in the last seven days. discontinued
